Off Calendar Mar-20-2018 Continued To Apr-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Damages Due To Trustee'S Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, To Remove Trustee, To Recover Remedies For Elder Abuse, & Determination Of Application
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Continued To Mar-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Ficenec for and with Michael Pierce (Petitioner).
Shari Garibaldi for Orin Pierce (Respondent).

The Court raised the issue of whether notice should have been given to the Children and the Spouses of the litigants. Mr. Ficenec stated that he can provide notice. The Court questions mediation. Mr. Ficenec stated that they have communicated extensively and could not resolve it. Ms. Garibaldi stated that her Client is willing to mediate. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than March 13, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by March 15, 2018. The Petition for Damages, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on March 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Court expects the notice issue to have been resolved by then.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
